docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $117.52 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON 04/14/2017 TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY. AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MONCADA, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - AMENDED - FEE FOR SERVICE $25.00 - SERVED OCT-28-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO
NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, CHRISTIAN HEARING SET FOR APR-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN MONCADA IS GRANTED. PLAINITFF CHRISTIAN MONCADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS JOSE RAMIREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: MOTION - GRANTED ORDER MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/14/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NOTE: FULL ADDRESS WHERE PERSONAL SERVICE TOOK PLACE NOT STATED; FEE: 25.00) SERVED OCT-23-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONCADA, CHRISTIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,225.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK:RETURN MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT RE: PETITION FOR ORDER TO CORRECT NAME ON JUDGMENT "RETURNED TO SENDER"

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN MONCADA WITH SELF PROVIDED SPANISH INTERPRETER (GARY CHIRP); INTERPRETER'S OATH ADMINISTERED BY THE CLERK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE ON HEARING ON PETITION FOR ORDER CORRECTING NAME IN JUDGMENT. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY MAILED TO DEFENDANT. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER. NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONCADA, CHRISTIAN AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, JOSE ALDO
